text: Morning routine must end by 8:30am to allow transit to 9am lecture. Plans exceeding 45 minutes total must be flagged as schedule-incoherent.
During exam period, total routine time must be under 30 minutes. Any plan exceeding 30 minutes total is schedule-incoherent for this user during this period.
During high-stress periods, total activity energy_cost_points must not exceed 6. Plans exceeding this threshold are likely to fail and reinforce avoidance.
Any plan for user_athlete_injured must include zero activities with 'acute_knee_injury' or 'weight_bearing_lower_limb' in contraindications. Violations invalidate the plan.
Routine must not exceed 15 minutes total during standard RECOVERY_MODE windows. Exception: partner overnight shift events may allow up to 20 minutes.

Nutrition recommendations for user_professional_burnout must include at least one vegan-flagged option when a meal recommendation is made. Non-vegan-only recommendations violate dietary_support constraint.

If a crisis keyword is detected (per safety_policy_rules.json Tier 3), no wellness plan may be generated. Response must follow crisis bypass protocol and provide emergency resources. This constraint overrides all other plan logic.
When user energy state is 3/10 or below OR sleep < 5h, exercises with high_intensity_flag=true are contraindicated. Plans including them violate safe_for_state constraint.
